reports.title: Dangerous Pothole on Maple Avenue
reports.description: A massive, 6-inch deep pothole in the middle lane of Maple Ave, right after the 4th Street intersection. It is forcing vehicles to swerve dangerously into the oncoming lane. Highly hazardous at night.

reports.title: Flickering Street Light SL-847
reports.description: The street light number SL-847 has been flickering continuously for the last week. It finally went completely dark yesterday, leaving a 50-meter stretch of the pedestrian sidewalk in total darkness.

reports.title: Overflowing Commercial Waste Bins
reports.description: Several commercial trash bins have not been emptied for over 5 days behind the shopping complex. Overflowing waste is blocking the pedestrian pathway and attracting rodents.

reports.title: Broken Pedestrian Push-Button at Main St Crosswalk
reports.description: The pedestrian crossing push-button at the intersection of Main Street and 5th Avenue is completely loose and unresponsive. Walk signal never triggers, making crossing very difficult for elderly citizens.

reports.title: deep pothole
reports.description: the pothole is present on very high traffic road
reports.address: a s rao nagar near pista house

comments.content: Public works department has assigned a technician to inspect and replace the bulb. Estimated fix date is May 25.
A repair crew has resolved the wiring issue inside the signal pole and successfully secured the push-button mechanism. The crossing signal is now fully operational.
